# Changelog

## v0.1.0

- Initial MVP with token counting, SQLite cache, safe tool bypass, context pruning, bounded LLM wrapper, fallback handling, metrics, CLI, tests, and documentation.
- Added benchmark-driven savings validation, narrow factual paraphrase cache canonicalization, extended safe math parsing, durable-fact pruning, deterministic quality fallback checks, and richer metrics.
- Added cost estimation, SQLite usage analytics, daily/monthly budget guardrails, response length modes, deterministic model routing, long-context protection, and personal prompt cache reuse.
- Added a local HTTP gateway with OpenAI-compatible chat completions and Anthropic-compatible messages endpoints, including basic SSE streaming and Anthropic tool-use passthrough for Claude Code compatibility.
